did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper developed a Computer-Aided Diagnosis (CAD) system using traditional image processing techniques (preprocessing, multi-thresholding segmentation, feature extraction based on the ABCD rule) and a deterministic classification method (Total Dermatoscopic Value calculation). It did not use machine learning, deep learning, or AI algorithms for the core diagnostic pipeline, although it references other works that do.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
